owner_operator_stated: Dr. Steve Napier is stated as Dentist/Founder of Grand Dental (Aurora).
notes: Address (1780 N. Farnsworth Ave., Aurora, IL 60505) and phone (630) 898-3610 both confirmed on the practice's own contact page. Site is branded 'Grand Dental' / 'Grand Dental Aurora', part of the multi-location 'Grand Dental Group' network (per meet-the-doctors page and Indeed company page); careers link on-site routes to the group-wide Indeed page, which lists 4 current openings, none specifically tagged to this Aurora location (nearest are Lake Zurich/South Elgin/Lockport IL) — flagged since this is a group-wide, not location-specific, hiring page.

owner_operator_stated: Site states the practice is part of 'Orahh Care Dental Community,' a brand owned by Heartland Dental LLC (a dental support organization); the legal entity of record is 'Tru Dental Illinois II, PLLC.' No mention of 'Hope Dental P.C.' or its principal anywhere on site.
notes: SUCCESSOR CONFLICT: record entity is 'Hope Dental P.C.' at 2418 W Indian Trl, Aurora IL 60506, phone (630) 907-2180. Both the exact address (2418 W Indian Trl, Ste E) and exact phone are now used by a different practice, 'Orchard Valley Dental,' operated under Heartland Dental's Orahh Care Dental Community brand (legal entity Tru Dental Illinois II, PLLC), led by Dr. Ridhima Aggarwal. No trace of 'Hope Dental' still operating at this address was found; NPI registry shows Hope Dental P.C. was historically registered at this address, consistent with a sale/rebrand into a Heartland-owned DSO location. Site has a careers link routing to Heartland's national jobs board; specific current openings for this location were not fetched/verified so openings[] is left empty rather than guessed.

owner_operator_stated: Homepage states the practice is 'Led by Dr. Bob Dokhanchi and Dr. John Micaletti.' No mention of any 'Wang' or 'Wang Family Dental, LLC.'
notes: SUCCESSOR CONFLICT: record entity is 'Wang Family Dental, LLC' at 2424 W Indian Trl, Aurora IL 60506, phone (630) 896-1086 (which also matches the vendor_website_hint domain bestdentistaurora.com exactly). Both the exact address (2424 W Indian Trail, Suite E) and exact phone are confirmed, but the operating practice is 'Fox Valley Dental Care Aurora,' led by Dr. Bob Dokhanchi and Dr. John Micaletti — no dentist named Wang appears on the site. Note: a Dr. Christine Wang, DMD does practice nearby in the same building at 2424 W Indian Trl Ste D (different suite and phone: 'Prairie Dental Care', (630) 907-0330) — that is a distinct practice/suite, NOT this record's Suite E address; flagged to avoid confusion. No careers page found on the corroborated site.

owner_operator_stated: Site states Dr. Young H. Kim 'purchased full ownership of Lincolnway Dental Center in December 2010'; Dr. Paloma Quintana is listed as an Associate dentist, not owner.
notes: Address (648 N Randall Rd, Aurora, IL 60506) and phone (630) 897-1300 both confirmed on the practice's own contact page — matches vendor_website_hint (lincolnwaydentalcenter.com). Record's practice_name is the individual provider 'Quintana Paloma DMD'; she is confirmed as a current Associate dentist at Lincolnway Dental Center, which is owned/operated by Dr. Young H. Kim (not Quintana) — not treated as an ownership_conflict since the named individual is still verifiably practicing at this exact address, just not as owner. No careers/jobs page found on site.

SUCCESSOR CONFLICT: record entity 'Elizabeth Zaun, DDS, PC' (dba Orchard Family Dental) at 1480 N Orchard Rd Ste 104, Aurora IL 60506, phone (630) 907-2700; the record's own historical domain orchardfamilydental.com now 301-redirects to an unrelated out-of-state site (familydentistsuwanee.com), i.e. a dead/repurposed domain. The exact same suite address (1480 N Orchard Rd Ste 104) is now used by a different-named practice, 'Smile More Dental,' with a DIFFERENT phone number ((630) 733-1111, not the record's (630) 907-2700) per smilemoredental.com's own Aurora location page. Search snippets also referenced 'Smile More Dental 3 Corp' at this address. No page naming any current dentist for the Smile More Dental Aurora location was found. Vendor_website_hint (Aurora-Il-Dentist.Com) did not resolve (ECONNREFUSED) and is treated as stale/wrong.

Address (541 Sullivan Rd, Aurora, IL 60506) and phone (630) 897-1156 confirmed via search-engine snippets of the practice's own site (fairviewdental.net) — matches vendor_website_hint exactly. Direct WebFetch of fairviewdental.net repeatedly failed with an SSL 'unable to get local issuer certificate' error, so page content was verified via indexed search snippets and individual doctor bio-page titles (meet-dr-* URLs) rather than a raw fetch. Site shows a named doctor roster (Bruno, Gorenz, Cardenas, Dominguez, Rogers, Tonner) but no dedicated careers page was found on fairviewdental.net itself (site: search returned no jobs/careers page); third-party Indeed/ZipRecruiter/Glassdoor listings show current openings (Patient Services Rep, Dental Hygienist, Dental Assistant) but those are off-site listings, not a page on the practice's own corroborated website, so not counted toward hiring_page_found.
